ksa_text: Knowledge of AI system inventory and documentation management, including cataloging and tracking of deployed AI systems, maintenance of organizational AI system registries, deployment status documentation, technical asset management, and organizational awareness of the AI technology landscape.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: knowledge maps directly to Chief Data and AI Officer scope — GOV-specific signals detected ("ai inventory"). STRM composite is minimal (0.0000 — likely framework vocabulary mismatch). Domain AI Governance (affinity 0.88) is a natural fit for this governance role. Seniority is appropriate for C-suite executive level.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External check: no matches in governance job postings or certification curricula (CDMP, DAMA, IAPP CIPP/CIPM, NIST AI RMF, ISO 42001). Would a working Chief Data and AI Officer self-report this as a required competency?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Challenge answered: the governance competency is implicit in Chief Data and AI Officer practice (domain affinity 0.88, 1 GOV signal(s)). Framework vocabulary matching underrepresents many legitimate governance competencies.
